name: gigafy_portal
title: Gigafy Management Portal
description: Read-only access to manage.gigafy.com.au via the Hotspot Login Services API. Sales orders, quotes, BOM lookups. Single shared service-account auth (transitional — Cameron's per-user OAuth + delegation will replace this).

credentials.label: Service account username
credentials.description: Username of the dedicated service account that AgentHQ uses to query the Portal.

credentials.label: Service account password
credentials.description: Encrypted at rest in the systemd-creds vault. Never visible to the LLM or to the agent user — only the trusted -mcp peer can decrypt it. Rotate via `sudo agenthq-cred set portal_api_pass`.

credentials.label: Reseller GUID
credentials.description: Gigafy's reseller GUID — used as a path segment in the Sales Orders search endpoint.

credentials.label: API URL
credentials.description: Defaults to https://au.api.hotspotlogin.services. Override only if you're pointing at a staging environment.

gigafy_portal_ping.description: Connectivity sanity check — mints a fresh access token and reports who we authenticated as

gigafy_portal_supplier_lookup.description: Find suppliers by name fragment — resolves a vendor name into the supplierEntityId GUID

gigafy_portal_stock_lookup.description: Find stock / catalogue items by name or code — resolves stockEntityId for a line item

gigafy_portal_account_lookup.description: Find chart-of-accounts ledger accounts by name or code — resolves coaEntityId / coaCode for a line item

gigafy_portal_tax_group_list.description: List every tax group on the reseller — used to pick taxGroupEntityId (typically GST or N-T)

gigafy_portal_work_order_lookup.description: Find a work order / job ticket by free-text — optional, only used when attributing a cost to a job

gigafy_portal_invoice_blank.description: Empty purchase-invoice template — the JSON skeleton the Portal expects when creating

gigafy_portal_invoice_history.description: Recent invoices from one supplier — for learning prior coding before composing a new invoice

gigafy_portal_invoice_load.description: Load a purchase invoice by GUID — full record including line items and attachments

gigafy_portal_create_purchase_invoice.description: Create a purchase invoice (PUT /Invoices) — flat header with stringified items array

gigafy_portal_invoice_attach.description: Attach a file (PDF / image / doc) to an existing purchase invoice — multipart upload

gigafy_portal_ledger_for_account.description: Ledger entries for one chart-of-accounts account over a date range — optional journal_filter (PJ/SJ/GJ/...) for purchase-only / sales-only views

gigafy_portal_ledger_for_accounts.description: Multi-account ledger roll-up — fan out across a list of GUIDs, return combined entries plus per-account totals
